---
title: "#easyplot"
format: gfm
---


## 2023-08-29

*12:09:06 - @Abdullah Al Nahid has joined the channel*
*12:09:11 - @Michael Love has joined the channel*
**Abdullah Al Nahid** (12:09:40):
> just created a github repo for the package:[https://github.com/nahid18/easyplot](https://github.com/nahid18/easyplot)

**Abdullah Al Nahid** (12:09:43):
> totally empty


## 2023-09-29

**Abdullah Al Nahid** (16:28:47):
> Pointers:
> 1. [https://github.com/tidyomics/genomics-todos/issues/5#issuecomment-1697691592](https://github.com/tidyomics/genomics-todos/issues/5#issuecomment-1697691592)
> 2. [https://github.com/tidyomics/genomics-todos/issues/5#issuecomment-1697794218](https://github.com/tidyomics/genomics-todos/issues/5#issuecomment-1697794218)


## 2024-01-23

*00:14:47 - @Shruti Shah has joined the channel*

## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (10:03:43):
> archived the channel
